title: Crusty Audio
description: Low quality, aliased audio from the PS1 Era!
body:
## Crusty Audio?

This is a resource pack that replaces all ingame audio with low quality PS1 era sounds, with a little extra aliasing for stylistic effect.

This resource pack works well specifically with the [PSX shader pack](https://github.com/ckosmic/minecraft-psx 'PSX shader Github').

This pack has also been highly compressed, so loading the zip file in game may load sounds late. So, extracting the pack is recommended.

---

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/kptqR3g1SQQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

---

<details>
<summary>The Effect Chain (For audio nerds :3)</summary>

This was made using Reaper's batch export options (the life saver!)

---

- ReaLimit
- dblue Crusher
    - Reduction: 4 samples
    - Bit Depth: 8 bits
    - Smoothing: 60%
    - Mix: 90%
- dblue Crusher
    - Reduction: 8 samples
    - Bit Depth: 8 bits
    - Smoothing: 60%
    - Mix: 20%
- ReaLimit

</details>
